what_it_does: This file is a channel attachment ledger entry for the design-assets channel, declaring an image attachment that points to image://design-assets/icons/image (37) and recording an id and timestamp.
observations: The file contains only YAML frontmatter with no body content.
The channel is design-assets and the attachment_type is images.
The target URI is image://design-assets/icons/image (37), including a space and parentheses.
There are no code symbols present.
standouts: The target URI contains literal whitespace and parentheses, which may need encoding in some consumers.
The file is purely metadata: an id, channel, type, target, and timestamp with no additional context.
conventions: Uses an ISO 8601 timestamp with explicit timezone offset.
Separates channel, attachment_type, and target fields.
concerns: The target URI includes unescaped spaces and parentheses, which could break naive URI parsers.
No checksum, MIME type, file size, or resolution metadata is provided for the referenced image.
The added timestamp is in 2026, which may be intentional but is unusual relative to typical ingestion dates.
notes: A minimal, timestamped attachment record that links the design-assets channel to a specific icon image URI.
questions: What does the '(37)' in the target URI signify?
Is image://design-assets/icons/image (37) resolvable by the consuming system?
What channel message or conversation does this attachment belong to?
Why is the added date set in 2026?
purpose_vs_actual: The stated purpose is to record an image attachment for a channel, and the content matches that purpose exactly.
intention_signals: It appears to be trying to create a durable, timestamped reference between a design-assets channel and a stored icon image so the attachment can be retrieved or audited later.
contribution: Provides a lightweight, timestamped attachment record that links a channel to an external image asset, supporting asset provenance and retrieval in a channel-memory ledger.
summary_for_embedding: A YAML-frontmatter channel attachment record for the design-assets channel referencing image://design-assets/icons/image (37) with id att-29af7179 and an added timestamp.
intention_for_embedding: To record and timestamp an image attachment associated with the design-assets channel.
